3059720.name: Eternal Bonds Demo
3059720.description:
This is only a demo!

Eternal Bonds is a puzzle platformer where you switch between the perspectives of two characters to solve puzzles in a spaceship. Can you and your unlikely duo escape the spaceship, or will you be stuck puzzling forever?

Features

  • A small single-player game (game length depends on how smart you are)

  • Solve puzzles by switching between the perspectives of two characters

  • Play as an astronaut and his robot each stuck in a different part of a deserted spaceship

  • Flip levers, push buttons, use portals and much more to reach the exit doors

  • Explore an exciting story
3059720.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 简体中文*, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
